title: Cuneiform Tablet #0037: Middle Babylonian Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
